rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHRIS V. MIGUEL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgement On The Pleadings.
rulings.Rulings: 1. As to the amended petition filed by Ruth Lewis to: (1) Compel an Account and Report; (2) Remove Co-Trustees and Compel Co-Trustees to Redress Breach of Trust; and (3) Name Petitioner Ruth Lewis as successor trustee - Grant. 2. As to Respondents' John Rey Miguel and Rosita Miguel Carey's response: *pertaining to the cause of action to Compel and Account & Report - grant without leave to amend. *pertaining to the cause of action for Removal of Trustee - grant with 30 days leave to amend. *pertaining to the cause of action to name Petitioner Ruth Lewis as successor trustee - grant with 30 days leave to amend.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SALVADOR M. NAJARRO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents, Set One, And For Attorney Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, February 26, 2009. Petitioner's motion to compel production of documents IS ordered off calendar at the request of the moving parties. = (610/BEC)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SALVADOR M. NAJARRO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Answers To Form Interrogatories Propounded To Adela J. Najarro
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, February 26, 2009. Petitioner Lillian Najarro's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories. The motion is ordered off calendar at the request of the moving parties. = (610/BEC)
